sentence_reviews.text: Normalizing flows use invertible transformations with tractable density; rectified and flow-matching models instead learn continuous transport vector fields.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning normalizing-flow background; Lipman et al. 2022 flow matching method.
sentence_reviews.notes: Normalizing-flow density claims and flow-matching vector-field claims are supported across the two sources; the combined node wording is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Continuous normalizing flows & learned vector fields, Flow matching & transport objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
